title: Backing up before cancellation

posts.author: mdcpa311 (Matt Doughty)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

Prior to cancellation does anyone have a recommendation on how to make sure they have all data off of Monday? I went through the export data process but read some people indicating to keep a Free account to have future access to data. Anything else people have done here to make sure they don’t lose anything before making a chance?
